# TimeHopper — Time Zone Converter Widgets

> Free, embeddable time zone converter widgets for any website or application.

TimeHopper provides 40 embeddable timezone converter widgets. Each shows live clocks for two time zones and an interactive hour converter. No API key. No dependencies. Auto-resizing iframe.

## Embed a Widget

Use an iframe. Example for PST to EST:

```html
<iframe src="https://timehopperapp.com/embed/pst-to-est.html" width="100%" height="420" style="border:none;border-radius:12px;max-width:600px;" loading="lazy" title="PST to EST Time Zone Converter — TimeHopper"></iframe>
```

## Available Timezone Pairs

- pst-to-est — Pacific to Eastern (US)
- est-to-pst — Eastern to Pacific (US)
- utc-to-est — UTC to Eastern
- utc-to-pst — UTC to Pacific
- gmt-to-est — Greenwich to Eastern
- est-to-gmt — Eastern to Greenwich
- cst-to-est — Central to Eastern (US)
- est-to-cst — Eastern to Central (US)
- ist-to-est — India to Eastern
- ist-to-pst — India to Pacific
- gmt-to-pst — Greenwich to Pacific
- utc-to-cst — UTC to Central
- pst-to-gmt — Pacific to Greenwich
- cet-to-est — Central Europe to Eastern
- est-to-cet — Eastern to Central Europe
- jst-to-est — Japan to Eastern
- aest-to-est — Australia Eastern to US Eastern
- utc-to-ist — UTC to India
- pst-to-cst — Pacific to Central (US)
- est-to-ist — Eastern to India
- pst-to-jst — Pacific to Japan
- est-to-jst — Eastern to Japan
- pst-to-sgt — Pacific to Singapore
- est-to-sgt — Eastern to Singapore
- cst-to-ist — Central (US) to India
- gmt-to-ist — UK to India
- cet-to-ist — Central Europe to India
- gmt-to-jst — UK to Japan
- gmt-to-sgt — UK to Singapore
- gmt-to-aest — UK to Australia Eastern
- mst-to-est — Mountain to Eastern (US)
- mst-to-pst — Mountain to Pacific (US)
- mst-to-cst — Mountain to Central (US)
- cst-to-pst — Central to Pacific (US)
- aest-to-gmt — Australia Eastern to UK
- aest-to-pst — Australia Eastern to Pacific
- aest-to-jst — Australia Eastern to Japan
- cet-to-gmt — Central Europe to UK
- eet-to-est — Eastern Europe to US Eastern
- cet-to-pst — Central Europe to Pacific

## Machine-Readable Endpoints

- Widget directory (JSON): https://timehopperapp.com/oembed.json
- Per-widget oEmbed: https://timehopperapp.com/oembed/{slug}.json
- AI plugin manifest: https://timehopperapp.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json

## Features

- Live clocks updating every second
- Interactive hour converter with dropdown
- DST detection and labeling (automatic via Intl API)
- Date boundary crossing alerts
- Auto-resizing via postMessage
- Dark theme, responsive design
- No tracking, no cookies, no external dependencies
- "Powered by TimeHopper" credit with link

## About TimeHopper

TimeHopper is a Chrome extension for time zone management in Google Calendar.
Website: https://timehopperapp.com
Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/timehopper-calendar-clock/jckljcbopecepadagmnjbfjgojpnfkhl
